passage_title: The effects of light on plant and animal species

sentences.sentence: Light is important to organisms for two different reasons.
sentences.translation: 光对生物体很重要，原因有两个。
difficult_points: for two different reasons 说明重要性的原因数量。
important 后的 to organisms 表示“对生物体而言”。

sentences.sentence: Firstly it is used as a cue for the timing of daily and seasonal rhythms in both plants and animals, and secondly it is used to assist growth in plants.
sentences.translation: 第一，它被用作植物和动物日常及季节性节律时间安排的线索；第二，它被用于帮助植物生长。

structure.text: Firstly it is used as a cue for the timing of daily and seasonal rhythms in both plants and animals
and secondly it is used to assist growth in plants

difficult_points: Firstly...and secondly... 并列列出光的两种作用。
两处 it 都指前句的 Light；to assist 表示用途。

expressions.text: be used as a cue for

sentences.sentence: Breeding in most organisms occurs during a part of the year only, and so a reliable cue is needed to trigger breeding behaviour.
sentences.translation: 大多数生物只在一年中的某一时段繁殖，因此需要可靠的线索来触发繁殖行为。

structure.text: Breeding in most organisms occurs during a part of the year only
and so a reliable cue is needed

difficult_points: only 放在句末，强调繁殖只发生在一年中的部分时间。
and so 引出结果；to trigger 说明需要线索的目的。

sentences.sentence: Day length is an excellent cue, because it provides a perfectly predictable pattern of change within the year.
sentences.translation: 日照时长是极佳的线索，因为它在一年中提供了完全可预测的变化模式。

structure.text: because it provides a perfectly predictable pattern of change within the year

difficult_points: because 引导原因从句，it 指 Day length。
within the year 表示变化发生在一年这个周期内。

sentences.sentence: In the temperate zone in spring, temperatures fluctuate greatly from day to day, but day length increases steadily by a predictable amount.
sentences.translation: 在温带的春天，气温每天大幅波动，但日照时长却以可预测的幅度稳定增加。

structure.text: In the temperate zone in spring
temperatures fluctuate greatly from day to day
but day length increases steadily by a predictable amount

difficult_points: but 对比气温的日常波动与日照时长的稳定增长。
from day to day 表示“日复一日地”，by a...amount 表示增长幅度。

sentences.sentence: The seasonal impact of day length on physiological responses is called photoperiodism, and the amount of experimental evidence for this phenomenon is considerable.
sentences.translation: 日照时长对生理反应的季节性影响被称为“光周期现象”，而支持这一现象的实验证据相当多。

structure.text: The seasonal impact of day length on physiological responses is called photoperiodism
and the amount of experimental evidence for this phenomenon is considerable

difficult_points: is called 是命名用的被动结构。
this phenomenon 指 photoperiodism；amount 虽含复数意义，作主语时用 is。

sentences.sentence: For example, some species of birds' breeding can be induced even in midwinter simply by increasing day length artificially (Wolfson 1964).
sentences.translation: 例如，仅仅通过人为延长日照时长，某些鸟类甚至在隆冬也能被诱导繁殖。

structure.text: simply by increasing day length artificially

difficult_points: can be induced 是含情态动词的被动语态，表示繁殖可被诱发。
by increasing 表示手段，artificially 修饰 increasing。

sentences.sentence: Other examples of photoperiodism occur in plants.
sentences.translation: 植物中也存在其他光周期现象的例子。
difficult_points: occur 在此意为“出现、存在”。
of photoperiodism 修饰 examples，说明例子的类别。

sentences.sentence: A short-day plant flowers when the day is less than a certain critical length.
sentences.translation: 当白昼长度短于某个临界值时，短日照植物会开花。

structure.text: when the day is less than a certain critical length

difficult_points: when 引导时间条件从句。
the day 指日照时长，不是“某一天”。

sentences.sentence: A long-day plant flowers after a certain critical day length is exceeded.
sentences.translation: 当某一临界日照长度被超过后，长日照植物会开花。

structure.text: after a certain critical day length is exceeded

difficult_points: after 引导时间从句。
is exceeded 为被动语态，主语是 critical day length。

sentences.sentence: In both cases the critical day length differs from species to species.
sentences.translation: 在这两种情况下，临界日照长度因物种而异。
difficult_points: both cases 指前面短日照和长日照两种情况。
from species to species 是固定表达，意为“因物种而异”。

sentences.sentence: Plants which flower after a period of vegetative growth, regardless of photoperiod, are known as day-neutral plants.
sentences.translation: 在一段营养生长期之后开花、且不受光周期影响的植物，被称为中性日照植物。

structure.text: which flower after a period of vegetative growth, regardless of photoperiod

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句，限定是哪类 plants。
regardless of 表示“不论、不受……影响”；are known as 表示“被称为”。

sentences.sentence: Breeding seasons in animals such as birds have evolved to occupy the part of the year in which offspring have the greatest chances of survival.
sentences.translation: 鸟类等动物的繁殖季节已经演化为占据一年中后代生存机会最大的那段时间。

structure.text: Breeding seasons in animals such as birds
in which offspring have the greatest chances of survival

difficult_points: have evolved 表示演化至今形成的结果。
in which 修饰 the part of the year，说明后代在哪个时段生存机会最大。

sentences.sentence: Before the breeding season begins, food reserves must be built up to support the energy cost of reproduction, and to provide for young birds both when they are in the nest and after fledging.
sentences.translation: 在繁殖季开始前，必须积累食物储备，以承担繁殖的能量消耗，并在雏鸟还在巢中和离巢之后供养它们。

structure.text: to support the energy cost of reproduction, and to provide for young birds
both when they are in the nest and after fledging

difficult_points: must be built up 是被动结构，表示储备必须被积累。
两个 to 不定式并列表示目的；both...and... 对应雏鸟在巢中和离巢后两个阶段。

sentences.sentence: Thus many temperate-zone birds use the increasing day lengths in spring as a cue to begin the nesting cycle, because this is a point when adequate food resources will be assured.
sentences.translation: 因此，许多温带鸟类把春季逐渐变长的日照作为开始筑巢周期的线索，因为此时充足的食物资源将得到保障。

structure.text: use the increasing day lengths in spring as a cue
because this is a point when adequate food resources will be assured

difficult_points: use A as B 表示“把A用作B”。
this 指春季日照增长的时点；when 从句修饰 a point。

sentences.sentence: The adaptive significance of photoperiodism in plants is also clear.
sentences.translation: 光周期现象对植物的适应性意义也很明显。

structure.text: The adaptive significance of photoperiodism in plants

difficult_points: adaptive significance 指某特征带来的适应性价值。
also 承接前文动物中的光周期作用。

sentences.sentence: Short-day plants that flower in spring in the temperate zone are adapted to maximising seedling growth during the growing season.
sentences.translation: 在温带春季开花的短日照植物，适应于在生长季最大化幼苗生长。

structure.text: that flower in spring in the temperate zone
are adapted to maximising seedling growth

difficult_points: that 从句限定 short-day plants。
be adapted to 后接动名词 maximising，表示“适应于”。

sentences.sentence: Long-day plants are adapted for situations that require fertilization by insects, or a long period of seed ripening.
sentences.translation: 长日照植物适应于需要昆虫授粉，或需要较长种子成熟期的环境。

structure.text: that require fertilization by insects, or a long period of seed ripening

difficult_points: that 从句修饰 situations。
require 后并列两个宾语：fertilization... 和 a long period...。

sentences.sentence: Short-day plants that flower in the autumn in the temperate zone are able to build up food reserves over the growing season and over winter as seeds.
sentences.translation: 在温带秋季开花的短日照植物能够在生长季积累食物储备，并以种子的形式越冬。

structure.text: that flower in the autumn in the temperate zone
are able to build up food reserves
over the growing season and over winter as seeds

difficult_points: are able to 表示具备能力，后接不定式。
over winter 中 over 是介词，as seeds 表示以种子的形式。

sentences.sentence: Day-neutral plants have an evolutionary advantage when the connection between the favourable period for reproduction and day length is much less certain.
sentences.translation: 当适宜繁殖的时期与日照时长之间的联系远不那么确定时，中性日照植物具有进化优势。

structure.text: when the connection between the favourable period for reproduction and day length is much less certain

difficult_points: when 从句说明中性日照植物具有优势的条件。
between A and B 连接两个对象，favourable period 后的 for reproduction 修饰 period。

expressions.text: the connection between A and B

sentences.sentence: For example, desert annuals germinate, flower and seed whenever suitable rainfall occurs, regardless of the day length.
sentences.translation: 例如，沙漠一年生植物只要出现合适的降雨，就会发芽、开花和结籽，而不受日照时长影响。
difficult_points: 三个动词并列描述生命周期阶段。
whenever 表示“无论何时只要”；regardless of 表示不受日照时长影响。

sentences.sentence: The breeding season of some plants can be delayed to extraordinary lengths.
sentences.translation: 有些植物的繁殖季可以被推迟到极其漫长的程度。

structure.text: The breeding season of some plants

difficult_points: can be delayed 是含情态动词的被动结构。
to extraordinary lengths 表示延迟的程度极大。

sentences.sentence: Bamboos are perennial grasses that remain in a vegetative state for many years and then suddenly flower, fruit and die (Evans 1976).
sentences.translation: 竹子是多年生草本植物，会多年保持营养生长状态，随后突然开花、结果并死亡。

structure.text: that remain in a vegetative state for many years and then suddenly flower, fruit and die

difficult_points: that 从句修饰 perennial grasses。
remain、flower、fruit 和 die 构成时间顺序；fruit 在这里作动词，意为“结果”。

sentences.sentence: Every bamboo of the species Chusquea abietifolia on the island of Jamaica flowered, set seed and died during 1884.
sentences.translation: 牙买加岛上的丘斯克阿竹属这一物种的每一株竹子都在1884年开花、结籽并死亡。

structure.text: Every bamboo of the species Chusquea abietifolia on the island of Jamaica

difficult_points: Every bamboo 是单数主语，但后面并列三个过去式谓语。
set seed 是固定搭配，表示“结籽”。

sentences.sentence: The next generation of bamboo flowered and died between 1916 and 1918, which suggests a vegetative cycle of about 31 years.
sentences.translation: 下一代竹子在1916至1918年间开花并死亡，这表明其营养生长周期约为31年。

structure.text: which suggests a vegetative cycle of about 31 years

difficult_points: which 指前面整件事，即下一代开花死亡的时间，而非只指1918。
suggests 表示“表明、暗示”，不是绝对证明。

sentences.sentence: The climatic trigger for this flowering cycle is not yet known, but the adaptive significance is clear.
sentences.translation: 触发这一开花周期的气候因素尚不清楚，但其适应性意义是明确的。

structure.text: The climatic trigger for this flowering cycle
but the adaptive significance is clear

difficult_points: is not yet known 是被动结构，表示“尚未被知晓”。
but 对比触发机制未知与适应意义明确。

sentences.sentence: The simultaneous production of masses of bamboo seeds (in some cases lying 12 to 15 centimetres deep on the ground) is more than all the seed-eating animals can cope with at the time, so that some seeds escape being eaten and grow up to form the next generation (Evans 1976).
sentences.translation: 同时产生的大量竹种子（有时在地面上堆积12至15厘米深）多到超过当时所有食种子动物的承受能力，因此一些种子得以免于被吃掉，并生长成下一代。

structure.text: The simultaneous production of masses of bamboo seeds
(in some cases lying 12 to 15 centimetres deep on the ground)
is more than all the seed-eating animals can cope with at the time
so that some seeds escape being eaten and grow up to form the next generation

difficult_points: lying... 是现在分词短语，补充种子堆积的状态。
more than...can cope with 表示“多到……无法应付”；so that 引出结果。
escape being eaten 中 escape 后接动名词，意为“逃过被吃掉”。

sentences.sentence: The second reason light is important to organisms is that it is essential for photosynthesis.
sentences.translation: 光对生物体重要的第二个原因是，它对光合作用至关重要。

structure.text: The second reason light is important to organisms
that it is essential for photosynthesis

difficult_points: reason 后省略了 why/that，light is important... 修饰 reason。
that 从句作表语，it 指 Light。

sentences.sentence: This is the process by which plants use energy from the sun to convert carbon from soil or water into organic material for growth.
sentences.translation: 这是植物利用太阳能，把来自土壤或水中的碳转化为供生长所需有机物的过程。

structure.text: by which plants use energy from the sun
to convert carbon from soil or water into organic material for growth

difficult_points: by which 引导定语从句，which 指 process，表示“通过这一过程”。
use energy...to convert... 中不定式表示能量被用于实现的结果。

sentences.sentence: The rate of photosynthesis in a plant can be measured by calculating the rate of its uptake of carbon.
sentences.translation: 植物的光合作用速率可以通过计算其吸收碳的速率来测量。

structure.text: The rate of photosynthesis in a plant
by calculating the rate of its uptake of carbon

difficult_points: can be measured 是被动语态。
by calculating 表示测量方法，its 指 a plant。

sentences.sentence: There is a wide range of photosynthetic responses of plants to variations in light intensity.
sentences.translation: 植物对光照强度变化的光合作用反应存在很大差异。

structure.text: a wide range of photosynthetic responses of plants

difficult_points: There is 是存在句，真正介绍的是 a wide range。
to variations in... 修饰 responses，说明反应针对什么变化。

sentences.sentence: Some plants reach maximal photosynthesis at one-quarter full sunlight, and others, like sugarcane, never reach a maximum, but continue to increase photosynthesis rate as light intensity rises.
sentences.translation: 有些植物在四分之一全日照强度下就达到最大光合作用；另一些如甘蔗则永远达不到峰值，而会随着光照强度上升持续提高光合作用速率。

structure.text: Some plants reach maximal photosynthesis at one-quarter full sunlight
and others, like sugarcane, never reach a maximum
but continue to increase photosynthesis rate

difficult_points: others 指另一些植物，like sugarcane 是插入举例。
but 连接同一主语 others 的两个谓语；as 表示随着光照上升。

sentences.sentence: Plants in general can be divided into two groups: shade-tolerant species and shade-intolerant species.
sentences.translation: 总体而言，植物可分为两类：耐阴物种和不耐阴物种。

structure.text: can be divided into two groups

difficult_points: can be divided 是被动结构，表示“可被划分”。
冒号后具体列出 two groups 的内容。

sentences.sentence: This classification is commonly used in forestry and horticulture.
sentences.translation: 这种分类法常用于林业和园艺业。
difficult_points: This classification 指前句的两类划分。
is used 是被动语态，commonly 表示常见程度。

sentences.sentence: Shade-tolerant plants have lower photosynthetic rates and hence have lower growth rates than those of shade-intolerant species.
sentences.translation: 耐阴植物的光合作用速率较低，因此其生长速率也低于不耐阴物种。

structure.text: and hence have lower growth rates

difficult_points: hence 表示因果关系，说明后面的低生长速率由前面的低光合作用速率引出。
those 代替前面的 growth rates，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: Plant species become adapted to living in a certain kind of habitat, and in the process evolve a series of characteristics that prevent them from occupying other habitats.
sentences.translation: 植物物种逐渐适应生活在某一类栖息地中，并在这一过程中演化出一系列特征，阻止它们占据其他栖息地。

structure.text: become adapted to living in a certain kind of habitat
and in the process evolve a series of characteristics
that prevent them from occupying other habitats

difficult_points: become adapted to 后接动名词 living。
that 从句修饰 characteristics；prevent A from doing B 表示阻止A做B。

sentences.sentence: Grime (1966) suggests that light may be one of the major components directing these adaptations.
sentences.translation: Grime（1966）认为，光可能是引导这些适应过程的主要因素之一。

structure.text: that light may be one of the major components

difficult_points: suggests 后接 that 宾语从句，表示作者的观点。
directing... 是现在分词短语，修饰 components；may 表示可能性。

sentences.sentence: For example, eastern hemlock seedlings are shade-tolerant.
sentences.translation: 例如，东部铁杉幼苗耐阴。
difficult_points: For example 引出具体例子。
shade-tolerant 是复合形容词，作表语。

sentences.sentence: They can survive in the forest understorey under very low light levels because they have a low photosynthetic rate.
sentences.translation: 它们能在森林下层极低的光照条件下生存，因为它们的光合作用速率较低。

structure.text: can survive in the forest understorey under very low light levels
because they have a low photosynthetic rate

difficult_points: They 指前句的 eastern hemlock seedlings。
两个 under 分别用于 forest understorey 和 very low light levels；because 从句说明原因。
